content.en:
"Why is the Mad Demon Sea so special?"

When Ye Tian was cultivating, he was also full of curiosity, so he probed around the Crazy Demon Sea, but unfortunately found nothing.

So, he gave up exploring for the time being, continued to cultivate, and when his willpower was raised to the half-step eighth order, he might have discovered something.

Eternal epoch after eternity has passed.

Ye Tian's replica body has been cultivating in the Mad Demon Sea, and his willpower has been continuously improved and refined.

this day.

Ye Tian's willpower finally changed dramatically.

Rumble!!!

The power of will is transforming, although the quantitative increase is not very much, but it is a qualitative change.

Soon, the qualitative change was completed.

Ye Tian's willpower seemed to distort time and space, penetrating the past and the future.

"The half-step eighth-order will, although it is half a step forward from the seventh-order peak, but this half-step is too difficult to cross, if it weren't for a place like the Mad Demon Sea, I am afraid it would take countless eternal epochs to improve my will power. "

Ye Tian muttered.

I have to say, this time I would like to thank the old man with white beard.

If it weren't for the reminder of the white-bearded old man, he wouldn't have known that the Mad Demon Sea was so important to him, and the ordinary peak Legendary Realm lord would only regard the Mad Demon Sea as a forbidden land, and he didn't know that this was a treasure land of chance.

Of course, the will strength is insufficient, and there is not enough potential, Ye Tian will not suggest others to come here, otherwise the other party will definitely go crazy, then it is not to help others, but to harm others.

After a while, Ye Tiancai completely stabilized the half-step eighth-order will power.

At this time, he had completely ignored the influence of the Mad Demon Sea.

Immediately, he began to continuously probe in the Mad Demon Sea, and with his half-step eighth-order eternal will, he really detected a little situation.

Near the center of the Mad Demon Sea, Ye Tian spied a scene through layers of time and space.

A cloud of blood continued to release infinite power, acting on the sea of mad demons.

"Could it be that the Mad Demon Sea has become what it is now, because of this mass of blood?"

Ye Tian secretly guessed.

If that's the case, this mass of blood is too terrifying.

A ball of bloodline affects an eternal sea, and it will also make the peak Legendary Realm Lord crazy, this is definitely not the blood of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, I am afraid that it is the level of the Eternal Master.

But there are only so many Eternal Masters, and even if their blood has such an effect, it won't stay here.

Or maybe it's some special creature that rivals the Eternal Master, and is slain by the Eternal Master, and a portion of its blood falls here?

Ye Tian didn't know, and he couldn't figure it out.

However, when he joins the Temple of Eternity, he may know a lot of secrets.

"It's time to leave, the Sea of Crazy Demons won't help me anymore~ on!

Ye Tian left the Mad Demon Zha.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to the Dao Domain Tower again.

The second level of the Daoyu Tower.

Ye Tian fought with that opponent again, this time he could spy on the opponent's attack, so as not to be hit by the opponent silently, and it was not easy for the opponent to avoid his own attack.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian and the other party kept fighting, almost equal to each other.

Time passed slowly, and after fighting for a long time, Ye Tian still did not defeat the other party.

In the end, Ye Tian gave up.

"I can't pass the second level for the time being, I must increase the degree of space-time fusion, most of the body's strength is converted into space-time control power, and I can comprehend one or two more space-time supreme skills to ensure that we can defeat the other party and pass the second level!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Moreover, he had to control more Dao, and if he controlled 300 Dao, he would at least have fulfilled one of the three major requirements.

For him, mastering the 300 paths is just a little more time, and there will be no bottlenecks, but it is the easiest requirement to meet.

And to raise the Eternal Will to the eighth order, or to pass the third level, he doesn't know how much time it will take, if he falls into a bottleneck, endless years can't break through, that's also a normal thing.

After the Eternal Will was raised to the half-step Eighth Order, Ye Tian's speed was many times faster than before, whether he was creating the Space-Time Supreme Technique or controlling the Dao.

This is one of the benefits of the Eternal Will being raised to the half-step eighth order.

More than a hundred eternal epochs have passed, and Ye Tian has finally created the fourth space-time supreme technique - Sword Slashing Three Bodies!

This is a space-time supreme technique that Ye Tian fuses time, space, sword and many daos, and focuses on space-time and swordsmanship, supplemented by other daos.

There are three moves to slash the three bodies with a sword, slash the past body, cut the present body, and cut the future body.

Cutting off the body means that the sword has already slashed the body of the enemy before they can react, just like slashing their past, they can hardly avoid it, they can't react, and they will die silently.

The slash is the most powerful, and it is the terrifying sword strike power that erupts by condensing the power of the sword slashing three bodies to the extreme.

Of course, this trick is easy to block.

And slashing the future body, a sword stabbed into the future.This sword slashing, it seems that nothing happened, but at a certain moment of fighting, this sword suddenly appeared, attacked, and with the slashing of the body, it is easy to make people unguardable.

The basis of the sword slashing three bodies is the half-step eighth-order will, if there is no half-step eighth-order will, it can't be created at all, and it can't be used.

Ye Tian created such a pure attack of the supreme technique of time and space such as sword slashing three bodies, and it was also aimed at the opponent of the second level of the Dao Domain Tower.

Now, the sword slash has been created, and the fusion of time and space has gone further.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian came to the Dao Domain Tower again.

Wow!

The opponent condensed out, and it was still the same as before, without any change.

Shout!

Both sides have made a move!

Bang!!!

Ye Tian directly cast a thousand true bodies and void walking, going all out to fight with the other party.

The two of them are constantly colliding with each other's space-time supreme skills, and their speed, strength, and defense are extremely terrifying, and there are almost no flaws.

In the middle of the battle, Ye Tian used his sword to slash three bodies.

Airplanes!!!

The sword qi seemed to be slashed in the past, although the opponent's will had reached the half-step eighth order, and the space-time attainment was very high, but in the face of this specially created space-time supreme technique, he still did not completely stop it.

Poof!

The sword qi that slashed three times stabbed his body, directly tearing out a gap, but it was quickly repaired.

However, the opponent in this level was still injured, although it was easy, but it gave Ye Tian hope.

Then.

Ye Tian used the body of slashing the future again, slashed with a sword, and nothing happened.

Then, Ye Tian continued to fight and collide with the other party, and then performed the trick of slashing the body, and the terrifying blow made the other party have to resist with all his strength.

And at this moment, another attack appeared silently and slashed at him.

This is the body of the future, and it finally appeared at this moment in the future.

Because this sword was too secretive, the other party didn't expect it at all.

Under the double attack, the opponent was directly injured.

And Ye Tian occupies an absolute advantage, and the victory is in sight!_
